findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 31. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The hierarchical data relationship diagram (flowchart) showing the relationships between Record Types 1, 7, 2, 3, 4, 5, and 9 is missing from the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 5 contains a flowchart/diagram showing Environmental Data (Record Type 1) and Gear Data (Record Type 7) pointing to Replicate Data (Record Type 2), which points to Species Data (Record Type 3), which branches to Individual Data (Record Type 4) and Tag Recapture Data (Record Type 9), with Individual Data pointing to Age Data (Record Type 5). The HTML conversion has no such diagram.

findings.description: The hierarchical diagram from Appendix B (showing the relationships between Record Types as a flowchart/organizational chart) is missing from the HTML. The HTML replaces it with a plain bulleted list.
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 contains a visual diagram showing Environmental Data Record Type 1 connecting to Gear Data Record Type 7, then flowing down to Replicate Data Record Type 2, Species Data Record Type 3, Individual Data Record Type 4 (with Tag Recapture Data Record Type 9 as extension), and Age Data Record Type 5. HTML converts this to a flat <ul> list losing the hierarchical relationship visualization.

findings.description: In Data Specification item 3, the data dictionary description includes 'field length' in the PDF text but the Appendix C data dictionary example table does not have a 'Field Length' column - it shows 'Column #' instead. This is faithful to the PDF. However, a minor text difference: the PDF says '.cvs' (likely a typo for .csv) and the HTML reproduces '.cvs' - this is faithful.
findings.evidence: Both PDF and HTML: 'delimited text (.txt or .cvs) file'

findings.description: The hierarchical diagram/flowchart image from Appendix B is not present as an image in the HTML at all - it was converted to a text list. No alt text issue per se, but the visual content is lost.
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 has a visual flowchart diagram. HTML has no tag for it.
